name: Trio Industrial Electronics Group Limited
summary: Trio Industrial Electronics Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates as an electronic manufacturing service provider for industrial electronic components and products in Europe, the People's Republic of China, South East Asia, North America, and internationally. It provides electro-mechanical products; smart chargers; switch-mode power supplies; and smart vending systems. The company also offers automatic testing equipment, as well as manufacturing management system, tools, and equipment; and sells and develops printed circuit boards and electronics subassemblies. Its products are applied in various industrial electronic equipment, such as renewable energy facilities, telecommunications equipment, commercial freight equipment, medical devices, and security systems. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Hung Hom, Hong Kong.
